creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #7)
Hello, I tested on 13.2-amd64-p3 xfce and it is working with no Access Violation pops up. Take a look at https://people.freebsd.org/~acm/ports/transgui/

Btw, I didn't compile it from ports. I installed it from packages-latest
